title: nova's Perfect MC
body: Welcome to nova's Perfect MC! This modpack enhances every small corner of Minecraft with, of course, mods! nova's Perfect MC is filled to the brim with optimization mods, QoL mods, and also prepackaged resource packs! This modpack was orginally used for personal use, and I really enjoyed using it, so you can trust that I didn't rush this out for downloads and revenue lol.
